requirements.summary: Update all visible app branding from 'GameVault' / 'GameAccount Marketplace' to 'GAME BAZAR' across the UI including HTML page title, header logo/title, and hero banner text
acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab title reads 'GAME BAZAR'.
The sticky header logo/title text reads 'GAME BAZAR'.
The hero banner <h1> on the Browse page reads 'GAME BAZAR'.
No visible instance of the old app name ('GameVault', 'GameAccount Marketplace', or similar) remains in the UI.

file_operations.description: Update the <title> tag from 'GameAccount Marketplace' to 'GAME BAZAR' to change the browser tab title.
Update the logo/title text in the sticky header from 'GameVault' to 'GAME BAZAR' to reflect the new app branding.
Update the hero banner <h1> text to 'GAME BAZAR' to match the new app name and ensure consistency across the UI.
